title: Dimensional Phantoms
description: Phantoms need some more Dimensional variety
body:
# ![Title Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/943f0b7502850b475c827f663dd4cefe7d88b1e3.png) This simple pack adds variants to phantoms for each dimension in minecraft.

To make the most of this pack, also add the pack to your world's Datapack folder, this will prevent texture variations from changing, perfect if you want to collect each variant!

## Compatibility This pack is natively compatible with both vanilla and FreshLX's Fresh Animations ## Dependencies This Pack requires Entity Texture Features [![Entity Texture Features](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Traben-0/Entity_Texture_Features/master/.github/README-assets/icon.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) Optifine can be used as an alternative (All Images Taken while using [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) and [Rethinking Voxels](https://modrinth.com/shader/rethinking-voxels)) ## Also Try: ### [Leafy Creepers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/leafy-creepers)
